title: Permission
description: Tool calls pass through hard denies, rule checks, and optional user approval before execution.

steps.annotation: The user asks for a filesystem action that may be safe or dangerous depending on the path.

steps.content: I'll check the target before running the command.
steps.annotation: The model can propose a tool call, but the harness decides whether execution is allowed.
A destructive-looking command enters the permission pipeline.

steps.content:
Gate 1 hard deny: pass
Gate 2 rule match: destructive command -> ask user
steps.annotation: The command is not absolutely forbidden, but it requires confirmation.
The runtime pauses before execution and resumes only after approval.
Allowed commands continue through the normal tool result path.
